description: Easy to use and stylish to use, this backpack from nike is perfect for daily use. Copiously spacious and easy to maintain, it makes for one fabulous bag for school, college and office goers. Height: 16.5" Width: 13" Depth: 8" Capacity: 19 litres Made of polyester with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a velcro flap pocket to store essentials One front zippered compartment for easy use One mesh pocket on the side to hold a sipper nike branding in distressed splash screen print on front zippered compartment, and embroidered swoosh on top  for style Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles with padded back for carrying ease Care Hand wash Do not bleach Do not tumble dryDo not wringDrip dry Do not iron
